item.description:
The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó James Noyes @jranoyes · 1min En respuesta a @YorkshireFlint y @BarstewardsThe Can we take a breath here for a moment and try to keep things civil?
It is true that Richard was an advocate of affordability checks from early on. See here: https:// racingpost.com/news/sky-bet-c hief-richard-flint-backs-culture-of-limits-for-online-betting-aFYPR1L1iFA0/ … And it is true that he encouraged me to focus on spend limits as an idea rather than stake Mostrar más racingpost.com Industry chiefs say gambling curbs need to strike right balance 1 1 7

Lydia Hislop reposteó Daniel Waugh @DanielWaugh6 · 12min En respuesta a @VaughanLewis1
@NevinTruesdale y @GamRegGB In the last five years, the Gambling Commission has repeatedly misrepresented statistics and research; funded activism against licensees, promoted anti-gambling opinions & speech codes and suppressed evidence on the basis of convenience. 1 1 1 159

item.title: BarstewardsThe: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 36min You orchestrated the checks, James Noyes did not devise them you did, yo
item.description: The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 36min You orchestrated the checks, James Noyes did not devise them you did, your proposals, was this not true Richard, maybe expand on this? Cita Richard Flint @YorkshireFlint · 38min Respondiendo a @BarstewardsThe @david_murphy698 y 2 más What on earth are you talking about? 1 940

item.description: Racing TV @RacingTV · 42min There is plenty to enjoy on our YouTube channel! Join over 210,000 other subscribers by clicking below De youtube.com 1 1 mil

https:// racingtv.com/news/wednesday -tips-horses-to-follow-newmarket-2026 … 1 1 2 2 mil

The Barstewards Enquiry reposteó The Barstewards Enquiry @BarstewardsThe · 2h En respuesta a @david_murphy698
@Stephenh61 y @nickluck Richard Flint, Kenny Alexander were the architects, they presented it to James Noyes and he approved it. He has since seen how the operators abused them, the BGC under Dugher welcomed them for years. Now James has realised that they aren't reducing harm and it's time to reverse. 1 1 4 1 mil
